chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1520 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 02-10-2025 Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received. However, upon perusal of the record, it transpires that the disability certificate submitted by the Petitioner, available at page 35 of the case file, was issued in the year 2013. It is evident that the said certificate is not in conformity with the recent legislative amendments. In view of the foregoing, the instant Constitutional Petition stands dismissed. Nevertheless, the Petitioner is at liberty to obtain a fresh disability certificate from the competent Committee constituted under the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018, vide Amendment of 2019. Judge Judge ARBROHI
